title: Azure Resource Manager REST API — Auth, Subscriptions, Resources

confirmed_facts.fact: ARM base URL: https://management.azure.com — all endpoints use this base with api-version query param
List subscriptions: GET /subscriptions?api-version=2022-12-01 — returns {value: [{subscriptionId, displayName, state, tenantId}]}
List resource groups: GET /subscriptions/{subId}/resourcegroups?api-version=2024-03-01 — returns {value: [{name, location, properties.provisioningState}]}
List all resources in subscription: GET /subscriptions/{subId}/resources?api-version=2024-03-01 — supports $filter, $top, $expand
Filter resources by type: ?$filter=resourceType eq 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines' — OData filter syntax
Pagination: ARM uses {nextLink} field (not @odata.nextLink) for paginated responses
Throttling: ARM returns 429 with Retry-After header. Read limits: 250 reads/5min per subscription per region. Write limits: 1200 writes/hour per subscription
Required app permissions: Reader role on the subscription or resource group scope — assign via Azure RBAC, not API permissions in the app registration
Resource tags: every resource has a 'tags' object in the response. Filter by tag: ?$filter=tagName eq 'env' and tagValue eq 'prod'

implementation_notes:
Get ARM token (different scope from Graph):
```python
def get_arm_token(tenant_id, client_id, client_secret):
    url = f'https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant_id}/oauth2/v2.0/token'
    resp = requests.post(url, data={
        'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
        'client_id': client_id,
        'client_secret': client_secret,
        'scope': 'https://management.azure.com/.default',
    }, timeout=(10, 30))
    resp.raise_for_status()
    return resp.json()['access_token']
```

List all VMs across a subscription:
```python
def list_vms(session, sub_id):
    url = f'https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/{sub_id}/resources'
    params = {'api-version': '2024-03-01', '$filter': "resourceType eq 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'"}
    results = []
    while url:
        resp = session.get(url, params=params, timeout=(10, 30))
        resp.raise_for_status()
        data = resp.json()
        results.extend(data.get('value', []))
        url = data.get('nextLink')
        params = None
    return results
```

Common resource types for filtering: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines, Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups, Microsoft.Sql/servers, Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts, Microsoft.Web/sites, Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults, Microsoft.Logic/workflows
caveats: ARM scope is management.azure.com — do NOT use graph.microsoft.com scope for ARM calls
api-version is REQUIRED on every ARM call — omitting it returns 400. Each resource provider has its own version.
ARM pagination uses 'nextLink' not '@odata.nextLink' — different from Graph API
The app registration must have RBAC role assignment (e.g., Reader) on the subscription, not just API permissions — this is a common confusion point
ARM throttling is per-subscription per-region — spreading calls across regions doesn't help if you're listing subscription-level resources
